_comment: Copy this file to your workspace at research/config/watch-topics.json and edit to reflect your topics. The pipeline reads this at runtime — changes take effect on the next run.

pools.label: Your Industry
topics: Recent developments in [your industry or sector]
Funding rounds or acquisitions in [your industry]
New product launches or major partnerships in [your industry]

pools.label: Tools & Stack
topics: New releases or breaking changes in [your primary programming language]
Updates to [key frameworks or libraries you depend on]
New capabilities in [your AI/ML tools or APIs]

pools.label: Local Area
topics: Local business openings and closures in [your city/neighborhood]
City council decisions or zoning changes in [your area]
Infrastructure projects or transportation updates in [your area]
Community events or local news in [your area]
